Atty. BETH ANN R. YOUNG, Esq. of Levene, Neale, Bender, Yoo & Brill LLP (Tel: 310-229-1234) for Third Parties Structural Capital Investments II, LP and Ocean II PLO LLC.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT NEUTRON HOLDINGS, INC.'s DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Neutron Holdings, Inc.'s "demurrer to plaintiffs' first amended complaint originally filed in Santa Clara County Superior Court" is overruled. The parties dispute whether the remedy of specific performance is available, but an allegedly improper remedy is not a ground for demurrer. (Caliber Bodyworks, Inc. v. Sup. Ct. (2005) 134 Cal.App.4th 365, 385.) Labeling a remedy a "cause of action" does not make it so.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
